column3:
Installation includes:

  • Fibre and Satellite installations will be carried out in two separate sessions.
  • This pricing includes fibre installation (up to 200 metres) and satellite kit installation (within 100 km of Volt’s warehouse), performed by a technician.
  • Additional charges may apply for extended Fibre/Satellite runs or locations beyond the range.
  • The fee charged covers a one-time installation only; any future installations will incur additional charges.

A deposit of $999 is collected when you choose installation.
(Upfront payment and non-refundable)

The remaining balance of $2439 will be invoiced upon successful completion of the fibre installation and must be paid in full prior to the installation of your satellite backup system.
